allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "Add startup video directory" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Adds `tauri-app/src-ui/public/video/` directory for placing a startup video asset
- Vite serves files from `public/` as static assets, so a video placed here \(e.g. `startup.mp4`\) will be accessible at `/video/startup.mp4` in the frontend

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify the `public/video/` directory exists after checkout
- [ ] Place a test video file and confirm it''s served at `/video/<filename>` during `cargo tauri dev`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd.exe /C "where /R D:\\  cargo.exe 2>nul || where /R E:\\  cargo.exe 2>nul || echo NOT_FOUND")

Bash(git -C "E:/Agents/abigail" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci: remove redundant build workflow

The Build workflow duplicated work already covered by CI \(compile +
frontend build on all 3 platforms\) and Release \(full Tauri build on
tag\). Its artifacts were not consumed by anything.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
